title: rubus × arenarius
intro: Rubus × arenarius, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Japanese raspberry (Rubus koehleri). This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Rubus × arenarius include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. Rubus × arenarius can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
